case_title: JOW JAMES N VS LAU MING YUEN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOW JAMES N AS TO DEFENDANT LAU MING YUEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
